voice.tone: Minimal and spatial-aware. UI text is brief — the canvas is the focus. Status messages are contextual to the user's position in the workspace.
voice.errors: Non-intrusive. Connection drops show a subtle reconnecting indicator at the canvas edge. Conflict resolution uses visual diffing on the affected object.
voice.loading: Canvas grid renders immediately. Objects fade in as data arrives. Presence rings pulse gently during connection establishment. No blocking loading screens.
voice.empty_states: Spatial and inviting. An empty canvas should show a subtle grid with a centered prompt to place the first element. Presence dots should appear as collaborators join.
